title: Non-compliant matching JSON: missing state of distillation on Straight Corn Whiskey (low-light, level 2, sideways)

form_data.reason: Straight whiskies require a state of distillation on the label.

image_prompt: Photorealistic mason jar style bottle with a simple white label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Yellowstone Moon', 'Straight Corn Whiskey', '50% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Bottled by Moonshine Masters, Knoxville, TN'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
visualObservation: Readable photo: lighting is imperfect but label text remains legible. Camera orientation is sideways (90 degrees).
